case_title: MANZANARES, RENE VS MURPHY, RICHARD ANTHONY

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY MURPHY, RICHARD ANTHONY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MANZANARES, RENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MANZANARES, RENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANZANARES, RENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, RICHARD ANTHONY $32.40 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52.40, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MURPHY, RICHARD ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MANZANARES, RENE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
